text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I lost again?! This is honestly, like, beyond the worst!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: This sucks! This isn't me! I can't take it anymore!
choice_data_list: I know it's tough, but you did your best.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: This sucks! This isn't me! I can't take it anymore!
choice_data_list: I know it's tough, but you did your best.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You seriously need to cut it out with that! It's such
a bad look.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
And not just for me. It reflects poorly on you as a
trainer too, you know—

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh, right... It's not just tough for me.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
choice_data_list: Will you give it another go with me?
Will you give it another go with me?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Geez... There's really no getting under your skin,
is there? You're so easygoing—it kinda pisses me
off.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Sigh... All right! I was a bit shook before, but I feel better now.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I'm not gonna quit running! I'm not giving up while
I'm down!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I don't know, but... it just sucks. There's no point
if I can't win.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Losing always brings me down! It's high-key the
worst thing ever!
choice_data_list:
Is that feeling stronger than the happiness you
feel when you win?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Winning is definitely pretty sick... Like, legit sick.
choice_data_list:
Then if you remember that feeling, you should
be able to get back on the track!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Putting it that way is totally unfair...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I mean, yeah, I get it though...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna do my nails now, so let's just talk about
it later.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After finishing her nails, Tosen Jordan seems to
completely turn her mind around to the next race.
